full_steam_ahead.ponder.steam_engine.tex: The engine body is a ring of Cylinder Walls around a Piston Head; one wall is a Steam Inlet
A second layer of Cylinder Walls closes around the Piston Body
Above an empty stroke space, a Create shaft becomes the engine's power output
Beside it, Blaze Burners provide the heat
Fluid Tanks over the burners form a boiler; a Boiler Outlet draws off its pressurized steam
Fluid pipes carry the steam from the outlet to the engine's Steam Inlet
Fed with steam, the piston drives the shaft, powering your contraptions like a giant steam engine
